DP.505.0000:
Ah, you have a Pokétch?
You will find it indispensable.\f
Science will become increasingly
necessary in the world of Pokémon.\f
DP.505.0001:
My name is Cyrus.\f
I am but another human seeking to
become Sinnoh’s greatest Trainer.\f
If you’re also a Trainer, then do
your best to gain power.\f
Be all that you can become.
DP.505.0005:
Grunt 1: Aren’t we Team Galactic?
And we’re assigned here?\f
Standing around among flowers...
This doesn’t seem all that cool.\f
DP.505.0006:
Grunt 2: Hey now! Don’t complain.
This is a pretty decent assignment.\f
But Bug- and Grass-type
Pokémon so creep me out...\f
I don’t like being here either.
DP.505.0007:
I wanted to get some flowers from
the Floaroma Meadow...\f
But some Team Galactic guys in
snazzy outfits came along...\f
DP.505.0008:
Those Galactic guys went to the
meadow past these flowers here...
DP.505.0009:
Being surrounded by flowers puts me
in an oddly pleasant mood.
DP.505.0010:
I simply love it here...
The atmosphere is so uplifting.\f
You came to get emotionally healed
too, didn’t you?
DP.505.0011:
Welcome to Floaroma, the town of
flowers, flowers, and more flowers!\f
You should plant some flowers of
your own, too. Yay for flowers!
DP.505.0012:
The Berries you pick can be used as
food for Pokémon.\f
You can also exchange them at
the florist’s for Accessories to\r
dress up your Pokémon.
DP.505.0013:
I got drawn here by the sweet scent
of Honey...\f
Seriously, what’s that? What am I?
A Pokémon or something? Mmm... Honey.
DP.505.0015:
Pick a Peck of Colors Flower Shop
Free Berries Available
